cases.question: Configure the NeMo Relay adaptive plugin with state, telemetry, adaptive hints, and validation before rollout.
cases.ground_truth: Use the adaptive config skill to configure the adaptive plugin through the shared plugin system, validate settings, and plan measured rollout.
expected_behavior: Use the shared plugin system for adaptive settings
Validate state, telemetry, hints, ACG, policy, or parallelism fields
Connect configuration to later performance tuning

cases.question: The adaptive plugin is configured; now consume its hints safely in application logic.
cases.ground_truth: Consuming already-configured adaptive hints belongs to nemo-relay-tune-adaptive-hints.
